title: Kanbus clock: wrap issue_created title lines instead of truncating

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing issue_created title wrapping in event cards and adding regression tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: issue_created title now wraps (pixel-width aware) instead of truncating. Missing status still defaults to OPEN. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (16 passed).
